summary_short: Settings hooks execute arbitrary shell on PreToolUse / Stop events.
visceral_consequence: a `git clone` can run shell commands

summary_short: MCP credentials stored plaintext in user-readable config.
visceral_consequence: any process can read every API key the agent uses
scope_phrase: which laptops still hold plaintext keys

summary_short: Symlink in workspace allows sandbox escape on read.
visceral_consequence: a malicious symlink reads files outside the workspace
scope_phrase: where the sandbox is already disabled

summary_short: Default config exposes MCP server unauthenticated on localhost.
visceral_consequence: any local process talks to your Azure DevOps tenant
scope_phrase: whose machines run unauth MCP servers

summary_short: Unsafe deserialization leaks secrets via prompt injection.
visceral_consequence: a poisoned tool response exfiltrates env vars
